basic_details.job_title: NGEL Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 114 Assistant Engineer & Deputy General Manager (RE) Posts
basic_details.organization_name: NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL), a subsidiary of NTPC Limited
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Engineer - RE (Asset Management/O&M), Deputy General Manager - RE
basic_details.job_location: NGEL Corporate/Station/Sites/Clusters/JVs and subsidiaries across India
basic_details.short_information: NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL), a subsidiary of NTPC Limited working in the renewable power and hydrogen generation business, has released Advertisement No. 02/26 inviting applications from experienced professionals for its Renewable Energy vertical. The recruitment covers a total of 114 posts across two positions - Assistant Engineer - RE (Asset Management/Operation & Maintenance) and Deputy General Manager - RE - for postings at NGEL's Corporate Office, Stations, Sites, Clusters, JVs and subsidiaries across India. Online applications are open from 11 July 2026 to 31 July 2026. This article

application_fee.details: Payment must be made online through the SBI Collect Payment Gateway using Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, or UPI. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

age_limit.details: Age relaxation, where a vacancy is identified for the category: 5 years for SC/ST candidates, 3 years for OBC candidates, and 10 years for PwBD candidates. Relaxation for Ex-servicemen is applicable as per Government guidelines.

qualification.details: Qualification: Fulltime Regular Diploma in Engineering (Electrical/Mechanical/Electronics/Electrical & Electronics/Instrumentation) from a State Technical Board or AICTE/UGC recognized institute, with pass marks. Experience: Minimum 10 years of post-qualification site experience in the Power Sector (including training period, if any), in a Govt. Organization/Public Sector Undertaking/Private Organization - of which at least 6 years must be in a 50 MW or more grid-connected Solar and/or Wind Project, in Operation and Maintenance/Asset Management. | Qualification: Fulltime Graduate in Engineering (Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electronics/Control & Instrumentation/Civil/Mechanical) with a minimum of 60% marks from a recognized Indian University/Institute. SC, ST & PwBD candidates with passing marks are eligible to apply. Experience: Minimum 12 years of post-qualification executive-cadre experience in the Power Sector (including training period, if any) - of which at least 10 years must be with a Renewable Energy Developer of Solar and/or Wind Projects, including a minimum of 2 years of site experience in a 50 MW or more grid-connected project in Construction/Erection/Commissioning. Government/PSU candidates applying for the E-6 level post must additionally have a minimum of 2 years' experience in the pay scale of ₹80,000-₹2,20,000 (IDA E-5 Grade or above, effective 01-01-2017) or equivalent, within the 12 years of post-qualification executive experience.

salary_details.details: Assistant Engineer - RE (E-0 Grade): Pay scale of ₹30,000 - ₹1,20,000, with an initial Basic Pay of ₹40,000. Other benefits such as Dearness Allowance, perquisites, allowances and terminal benefits are admissible as per company rules. Deputy General Manager - RE (E-6 Grade): Pay scale of ₹90,000 - ₹2,40,000, with an initial Basic Pay of ₹90,000. Other benefits such as Dearness Allowance, perquisites, allowances and terminal benefits are admissible as per company rules.

selection_process: NGEL reserves the right to conduct a multistage selection process to restrict the number of candidates
etc.) Written Test / Group Discussion / Interview

The company also reserves the right to raise the minimum eligibility standards/criteria as per requirement. Merely fulfilling the minimum eligibility criteria does not guarantee shortlisting for the next stage.
how_to_apply: Visit the careers section of the official website: www.ngel.in.
Applications are accepted through online mode only; no other mode will be accepted.
Register using a valid email ID - no change in email ID is allowed later, as all correspondence will be sent via email.
Fill in the online application form with correct personal, educational and experience details.
Upload all required documents (as listed above) in clear and legible format at the time of applying.
Pay the applicable non-refundable registration fee online through the SBI Collect Payment Gateway, if applicable to your category.
After submission, download the system-generated application slip with the unique form number and retain it for future reference. No documents need to be sent by post.
important_instructions: All computations of age, experience and qualification will be done with reference to the last date of online application. In case of multiple applications for the same post by one candidate, the application with the higher sequence number will be considered. The Company reserves the right to cancel, restrict, curtail or increase the number of vacancies without further notice. Selected candidates may be posted at any Corporate Centre/Site/Station/Project/JV/Subsidiary of NGEL; all posts are transferable at the Management's discretion. If ineligibility, false information, or suppression of material facts is detected at any stage - even after appointment - the candidature or service will be liable to cancellation/termination without notice. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. Applications with incomplete, insufficient or illegible documents will be rejected. The age of superannuation at NGEL is 60 years. Any dispute arising from this recruitment falls under the sole jurisdiction of courts/tribunals in Delhi. In case of any ambiguity between language versions of the notification, the English version will prevail.

content_sections.heading: NGEL Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: NGEL has announced 114 projected vacancies across two posts, with category-wise distribution as follows. The company has stated that the total number of projected vacancies may increase or decrease at the discretion of NGEL Management. Reservation for PwBD candidates will be applicable as per Government Guidelines, in addition to the category-wise numbers above.

tables.caption: Assistant Engineer - RE (Asset Management/Operation & Maintenance) (E-0 Grade) - 100 Posts
Deputy General Manager - RE (E-6 Grade) - 14 Posts

content_sections.heading: NGEL Recruitment 2026: Eligibility
content_sections.text: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. All qualifications must be from Universities/Institutions recognized and approved in India. Age, experience and qualification will be computed with reference to the last date of receipt of online application. Category (SC/ST/OBC/PwBD) selected in the online application cannot be changed later, and no benefit of another category will be admissible afterward.

content_sections.heading: NGEL Educational Qualification & Experience
content_sections.text: Qualification: Fulltime Regular Diploma in Engineering (Electrical/Mechanical/Electronics/Electrical & Electronics/Instrumentation) from a State Technical Board or AICTE/UGC recognized institute, with pass marks. Experience: Minimum 10 years of post-qualification site experience in the Power Sector (including training period, if any), in a Govt. Organization/Public Sector Undertaking/Private Organization - of which at least 6 years must be in a 50 MW or more grid-connected Solar and/or Wind Project, in Operation and Maintenance/Asset Management. Qualification: Fulltime Graduate in Engineering (Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electronics/Control & Instrumentation/Civil/Mechanical) with a minimum of 60% marks from a recognized Indian University/Institute. SC, ST & PwBD candidates with passing marks are eligible to apply. Experience: Minimum 12 years of post-qualification executive-cadre experience in the Power Sector (including training period, if any) - of which at least 10 years must be with a Renewable Energy Developer of Solar and/or Wind Projects, including a minimum of 2 years of site experience in a 50 MW or more grid-connected project in Construction/Erection/Commissioning. Government/PSU candidates applying for the E-6 level post must additionally have a minimum of 2 years' experience in the pay scale of ₹80,000-₹2,20,000 (IDA E-5 Grade or above, effective 01-01-2017) or equivalent, within the 12 years of post-qualification executive experience.

content_sections.heading: NGEL Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age relaxation, where a vacancy is identified for the category: 5 years for SC/ST candidates, 3 years for OBC candidates, and 10 years for PwBD candidates. Relaxation for Ex-servicemen is applicable as per Government guidelines.

content_sections.heading: NGEL Recruitment 2026 Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Assistant Engineer - RE (E-0 Grade): Pay scale of ₹30,000 - ₹1,20,000, with an initial Basic Pay of ₹40,000. Other benefits such as Dearness Allowance, perquisites, allowances and terminal benefits are admissible as per company rules. Deputy General Manager - RE (E-6 Grade): Pay scale of ₹90,000 - ₹2,40,000, with an initial Basic Pay of ₹90,000. Other benefits such as Dearness Allowance, perquisites, allowances and terminal benefits are admissible as per company rules.

content_sections.heading: NGEL Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: Payment must be made online through the SBI Collect Payment Gateway using Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, or UPI. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: NGEL Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: NGEL reserves the right to conduct a multistage selection process to restrict the number of candidates, which may comprise: Application shortlisting/screening (based on qualification, percentage of marks, years of experience, etc.) Written Test / Group Discussion / Interview, or a combination of these The company also reserves the right to raise the minimum eligibility standards/criteria as per requirement. Merely fulfilling the minimum eligibility criteria does not guarantee shortlisting for the next stage.

content_sections.heading: NGEL Health & Medical Standards
content_sections.text: Candidates must possess sound health. Before joining, selected candidates must undergo a medical examination at a specified government hospital (of at least district hospital status). No relaxation in prescribed health standards is allowed. Detailed medical norms are available on www.ngel.in, and applicants are advised to review them before applying.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for NGEL Application
content_sections.text: Class X/Matriculation passing certificate/marksheet, valid Aadhaar Card and PAN Card (for proof of name and date of birth, which must match across all documents) For E-0 Grade: Diploma consolidated marksheet/transcript/all semester marksheets showing aggregate percentage, and passing certificate For E-6 Grade: Engineering consolidated marksheet/transcript/all semester marksheets showing aggregate percentage, and passing certificate Marks conversion formula from the university/institute, where CGPA/CGPI/DGPA/CGI/CPI needs conversion to percentage Documents for other qualifications (pass certificates and marksheets), if any Caste/Disability certificate (for SC/ST/OBC-NCL/PwBD/EWS candidates), as applicable OBC-NCL certificate in the central format valid for FY 2026-27 EWS candidates: current-year Income & Asset certificate valid for FY 2026-27, based on FY 2025-26 income Disability certificate in the latest Central Govt. format, generated via the Swalamban/UDID portal, matching the identified disability type for the post Experience-related documents for each organization, in chronological order from current/recent to first employer, including any combination of: Experience/Service Certificate, Offer/Appointment Letter, Joining/Confirmation/Absorption/Relieving Letter, and two pay slips per year of service Documents demonstrating position held/work area, such as Role Assignment Orders, Organization Charts, Transfer Orders, or Promotion Orders NOC (No Objection Certificate) from current employer, required at the time of interview for candidates from Govt./PSU organizations (or an undertaking to submit it later)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NGEL Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the careers section of the official website: www.ngel.in . Applications are accepted through online mode only; no other mode will be accepted. Register using a valid email ID - no change in email ID is allowed later, as all correspondence will be sent via email. Fill in the online application form with correct personal, educational and experience details. Upload all required documents (as listed above) in clear and legible format at the time of applying. Pay the applicable non-refundable registration fee online through the SBI Collect Payment Gateway, if applicable to your category. After submission, download the system-generated application slip with the unique form number and retain it for future reference. No documents need to be sent by post. Direct Link to Apply

content_sections.heading: NGEL Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: All computations of age, experience and qualification will be done with reference to the last date of online application. In case of multiple applications for the same post by one candidate, the application with the higher sequence number will be considered. The Company reserves the right to cancel, restrict, curtail or increase the number of vacancies without further notice. Selected candidates may be posted at any Corporate Centre/Site/Station/Project/JV/Subsidiary of NGEL; all posts are transferable at the Management's discretion. If ineligibility, false information, or suppression of material facts is detected at any stage - even after appointment - the candidature or service will be liable to cancellation/termination without notice. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. Applications with incomplete, insufficient or illegible documents will be rejected. The age of superannuation at NGEL is 60 years. Any dispute arising from this recruitment falls under the sole jurisdiction of courts/tribunals in Delhi. In case of any ambiguity between language versions of the notification, the English version will prevail.

faq.question: Q1. How many total vacancies are there in NGEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 114 total projected vacancies - 100 for Assistant Engineer - RE (E-0 Grade) and 14 for Deputy General Manager - RE (E-6 Grade).

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for NGEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window is open from 11 July 2026 (10:00 Hrs.) to 31 July 2026 (18:00 Hrs.).

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for Assistant Engineer - RE at NGEL?
faq.answer: A fulltime regular Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical/Electronics/Electrical & Electronics/Instrumentation Engineering from a State Technical Board or AICTE/UGC recognized institute, along with a minimum of 10 years of post-qualification site experience in the Power Sector.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for NGEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 40 years for Assistant Engineer - RE and 44 years for Deputy General Manager - RE, with relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for PwBD candidates, wherever a vacancy is identified for that category.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for NGEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General/EWS/OBC candidates must pay ₹500. SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-servicemen candidates and female candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the pay scale for Deputy General Manager - RE at NGEL?
faq.answer: The pay scale is ₹90,000 - ₹2,40,000 (E-6 Grade), with an initial Basic Pay of ₹90,000, plus applicable allowances and benefits.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NGEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection may involve application shortlisting/screening, followed by a Written Test, Group Discussion, and/or Interview, or a combination of these, at NGEL's discretion.

faq.question: Q8. Is there a written exam for NGEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NGEL has stated it may conduct a Written Test/Group Discussion/Interview or a combination as part of a multistage selection process; the exact stage(s) applicable are Not specified for each post in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Do Government/PSU employees need an NOC to apply for NGEL posts?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from Government Organizations/Public Sector Undertakings must produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their employer at the time of interview, or submit an undertaking to do so within a stipulated time frame.

faq.question: Q10. Can the number of vacancies change after the notification is released?
faq.answer: Yes, NGEL has explicitly stated that the total number of projected vacancies may increase or decrease at the discretion of NGEL Management.
